# sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_notification_target (Data Source)

Get information about an existing Monitoring Suite Alert Notification Target.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_notification_target" "foobar" {
  id = "alert-notification-target-uuid-id"
  alert_id = "alert-project-resource-id" # e.g. sakura_monitoring_suite_alert.foobar.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alert_id` (String) The resource ID of the Alert Project.

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the Monitoring Suite Alert Notification Target.

### Read-Only

- `config` (String) The config of the Alert Notification Target.
- `description` (String) The description of the Monitoring Suite Alert Notification Target.
- `service_type` (String) The service type of the Alert Notification Target.
- `url` (String) The URL of the Alert Notification Target.
